Core Capabilities

BUILT FOR THE EDGE OF CONFLICT

01
Armor Architecture

Multi-layered composite and ballistic steel construction certified to EN 1063 B6. Engineered to defeat 7.62x51mm NATO FMJ rounds, fragmentation, and blast overpressure at combat-relevant distances.

02
Powertrain

Ford 6.7L Power Stroke turbocharged diesel producing 475 horsepower and 1,050 lb-ft of torque, mounted on a reinforced F-550 chassis. Paired with a 6-speed TorqShift automatic transmission with full-time 4WD capability across any terrain.

03
Modular Mission Bay

Configurable rear compartment accommodates command post, medical evacuation, troop transport, or weapons station configurations. Quick-change mounting rails throughout.

04
Situational Awareness

360-degree camera array, thermal imaging ports, and multiple firing ports with blast-proof glazing. Integrated comms and GPS hardpoints as standard across all variants.

05
Suspension & Mobility

Heavy-duty suspension front and rear with reinforced shock absorbers rated for armored payload. 17.3 in ground clearance, 60% gradient climb capability, and 4 ft water fording without preparation.

06
Rapid Deployment

Air-transportable by C-130 and equivalent. Self-recovery winch rated to 20,000 lb, run-flat tire inserts, and centralized tire inflation system for field pressure management.
